raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Or ta nomeſlota Teefa
preekſch Juhda Behr-
neem/ pehz fatwahm Sai-
mehm/ bija pee tahs Eedoma
Rohbeschaa/ tahs Tukſneses Zin/
prett Deenas-Widdus Stuhri.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta ka winno Rohbescha
prett Deenas Widdu tahs Sahls-
Juhras Gals btja/ no tahs Meh-
les/ kas prett Deenas Widdu
steepjabs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un iſeek prett Deenas Wid-
dus Puﬀi lihds Rihteem no Akra-
bim/ un eet zauri lihds Zinnam/ un
eet augſcham no Deenas Widdus
Puﬀes lihds Rahdes-Barneai.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un eet zaur Ezronu/ un
steepjahs uſ augſchu lihds Ahda-
ram/ un eet apkahrt Karku/ un
eet zauri lihds Azmonam/ un
nahk ahra pee tahs Uppes no E-
giptes/ un tahs Rohbeschaa Gals
lat steepjahs prett Juhrn/ fchi
latd irr juhsu Rohbeschaa Dee-
nas Widdu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ta Rohbeschaa prett Riht-
teem laid irr ta Sahls-Juhra/
lihds Jardanas Gallam/ un ta
Rohbeschaa tai Puﬀe prett See-
meli laid irr no tahs Juhras
Mehles lihds Jardanas Gallam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un fchi Rohbeschaa laid ang-
scham eet lihds Bet-Aglai/ un
zaureet no Seemeta Puﬀes lihds
Bet-Arabai/ un ta Rohbeschaa
laid us augſchu eet lihds Boena/
Ruhbena Dehla Akminaim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo prohjam buhs fchai Roh-
beschaa us augſchu eet lihds De-
biram/ no tahs Akora Geleijas/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "un laid prett Seemeli steepja-
tihds Gilgalam/ kas no Adum
prett Rihteem irr/ kas no Ri-
Puﬀes pee tahs Uppes gull/ pe-
cho laid fchi Rohbeschaa zaurs
us to Uhdeni En-Seemes/
winnas Gals laid steepjahs li-
Rogeles Akai.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un fcht Rohbeschaa laid
augſchu eet/ zaurs ta Innom
Dehla Geleiju/ fahnis Jebuſe-
no Deenas Widdus Puﬀes/ f-
irr Jerusaleme/ un fchi Rohbe-
laid augſcham eet/ lihds ta K-
na Wirs-Gallam/ kas us Pre-
schn tahs Innoma Geleijas ir-
prett Wakara Puﬀes/ kas ste-
jahs lihds Gallam tahs Gelei-
Rewaim prett Seemeli.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Pehz to laid fchi Roh-
scha steepjahs no ta Kalna Wi-
Galla/ lihds tai Uhdens Aſ-
Newtoai/ un ahra nahk us tee-
Pilsfahteem ta Gewrona Kaln-
schi Rohbeschaa laid steepjahs li-
Baalat/ fchi irr Kiriat-Ju-
rim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Pehz to laid fchi Roh-
scha atgreeschahs no Baalas li-
Wakara Puﬀei/ lihds teem S-
ra Kalneem/ un zaureet fah-
teem Kalneem Jearim no Seen-
ta Puﬀes/ fchi irr Reffalons/
nahk leija lihds Bet-Geemes/
eet zaur Tiinnatu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ta Rohbeschaa nahk-
ra fahnis Efroun prett Seeme-
Puﬀi/ un steepjahs lihds Si-
nam/ un eet pahr to Baalas K-
nu/ un nahk ahra lihds Jabu-
lan
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
